body:
The amounts specified in column (2) below in respect of each person or couple specified in column (1) are to be the amounts specified for the purposes of paragraphs 1(1)(a) and 2(2)(a) and (b) of Schedule 6.
Column (1)
Person or couple
Column (2)
Amount
A single applicant who —
is entitled to main phase employment and support allowance;
is aged not less than 25;
is aged not less than 18 but less than 25.
Lone parent.
Couple.
| Column (1)Person or couple | Column (2)Amount |
| --- | --- |
| 1A single applicant who — |  |
| is entitled to main phase employment and support allowance; | £101.85; |
| is aged not less than 25; | £101.85; |
| is aged not less than 18 but less than 25. | £80.60. |
| 2Lone parent. | £101.85. |
| 3Couple. | £159.85. |
heading: Schedule 7 paragraph 1 - Personal allowances
